front.title: Maximum Number of Paths Reached Notification for BGP

abstract.t: This document defines a new BGP Cease NOTIFICATION message subcode, "Maximum Number of Paths Reached", used when a BGP speaker terminates a peering because the number of paths received from a neighbor, as permitted by BGP ADD-PATH, exceeds a locally configured upper bound. That bound may be applied on a per-prefix basis or as an aggregate limit across an address family.
